name: 季节Campaign

prompt_template.subject: {product_description}
prompt_template.layout: 2x2 or 3x2 grid, one product across seasonal settings
prompt_template.spring: pastel tones, blossoms, morning dew, soft light
prompt_template.summer: bright warm tones, tropical elements, golden light
prompt_template.autumn: warm amber, dried leaves, cinnamon, window light
prompt_template.winter: cool blues, pine branches, frost, moonlight
prompt_template.quality: 8K, brand campaign photography, consistent product placement

defaults.layout: 2x2 grid with thin white or brand-colored borders
defaults.consistency: same product angle and size across all quadrants

overrides.layout: 2x2 grid, each quadrant a full seasonal scene
2x3 or 3x2 grid, holidays: 春节/元宵/清明/端午/七夕/中秋/重阳/圣诞
2x2 or 3x2 grid, product in different life stages: 单身/新婚/育儿/改善
2x3 grid, product in different rooms: 客厅/卧室/书房/餐厅/阳台/浴室

category_tips.skincare: 春=焕新+花粉防护, 夏=防晒+清爽, 秋=保湿+修复, 冬=滋润+屏障
category_tips.fashion: 季节穿搭风格变化、面料材质变化、色彩调性变化
category_tips.home: 季节家居布置变化、色调调整、氛围变化
category_tips.furniture: 季节舒适重点变化、材质适配、空间氛围
category_tips.food: 季节食材变化、烹饪方式变化、餐桌氛围
category_tips.fragrance: 季节香调匹配、氛围元素对应

examples: Seasonal campaign 2x2 grid. Same {product_description} in four seasonal settings: Spring quadrant with cherry blossoms, soft morning light, pastel tones; Summer quadrant with tropical elements, golden sunlight, vibrant colors; Autumn quadrant with maple leaves, warm amber tones, window light; Winter quadrant with pine branches, frost details, cool blue moonlight. Consistent product angle and scale across all four. Thin {border_color_hex} borders between quadrants. Season labels 「春」「夏」「秋」「冬」 in elegant font. 8K brand campaign photography, 2000x2000px

Holiday campaign 3x2 grid. {product_description} in six holiday scenes: 春节 red lanterns and spring couplets; 元宵 lantern festival elements; 端午 dragon boat and zongzi; 七夕 romantic鹊桥 elements; 中秋 moon and mooncakes; 圣诞 pine tree and decorations. Each quadrant shows product integrated into specific holiday atmosphere. Holiday name labels 「{节日名}」 in appropriate seasonal font. 2000x3000px or 3000x2000px

style_lock_fields.palette: 四季色系变化 + 产品固定色
style_lock_fields.composition: 网格统一、产品角度一致
